content.en:
"This is the Blood Curse Celestial Stone!"

Ye Tian looked at the pile of blood-colored stones in front of him, revealing excitement.

This is a fourth-order Supreme Path rule item, and it can be easily obtained, which is a bit unreal.

"Let's start cultivating!"

He announced a retreat, as for the killing of Xu Guang, he forgot about it for the time being, and if he could complete it, it would be done, and it would not be a big deal if he couldn't complete it.

Subsequently.

He began refining the Blood Curse Celestial Stone.

The first Blood Curse Heavenly Stone was refined, and the bloodlines of this replica body began to dry up, and wisps of cursed power began to entangle.

However, he didn't care at all, and continued to comprehend the rules of the fourth sequence of supreme paths.

As time passed, Ye Tian's Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules slowly improved.

this day.

The damage to this replica body was so severe that it was eroded and collapsed by the power of the curse.

As a result, he condensed a new copy body, continued to refine the Blood Curse Heavenly Stone, and continued to comprehend the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules.

Of course.

He also copied a weak Supreme Dao Void Demon and worked in the Supreme Blood Realm, while monitoring Xu Guang's place and waiting for Xu Guang to come out.

Finally on this day, he waited for Xu Guang.

Xu Guang, under the protection of a group of Supreme Dao Void Demon guards, left the Supreme Blood Realm, not knowing where to go.

After Ye Tian learned this information, he went out directly.

He was about to attack Xu Guang, but before leaving, he asked for another batch of Blood Curse Heavenly Stones, and then ran away.

......

A sea of hot clouds.

Xu Guang came here, he came here to look for materials, his research experiments are still short of some materials, but he needs to find them himself to determine whether the materials are available, this kind of thing can only be done by himself.

This is the inside of the Heavenly Blood of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, and he is not afraid that the Supreme Dao Realm of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance will come to kill him.

Moreover, he himself was an eightfold supreme Dao realm, and there was a ninth-fold supreme Dao Void Demon and thirty eightfold supreme Dao Void Demons by his side to protect him, so he hardly had to worry about safety.

At this time, Ye Tian came to this vicinity as a blood king.

Of course.

His other Blood Huangzi copy body would have run away a long time ago, otherwise once he attacked and killed Xu Guang, his copy body would not have thought of escaping.

It doesn't matter if you lose other resources, you can't lose those Blood Curse Heavenly Stones!

"What is Xu Guang doing in the sea of clouds? It doesn't matter, just condense the real body here, copy the body, and then attack and kill Xu Guang. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Soon, the real body copy body condensed successfully.

Airplanes!

He shuttled quickly and came to the sea of hot clouds.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian used the fourth sequence of the Supreme Dao Rules to cast the fourth sequence of the Supreme Dao Rules to kill Xu Guang, as long as he touched Xu Guang, Xu Guang would definitely die.

However, at this moment, a ray of light appeared on Xu Guang's body, forming a defense, trying to resist this attack, and his Supreme Dao Void Demon Guards reacted quickly.

Rumble!!!!!

These Supreme Void Demons unleashed a defensive array, immediately forming a terrifying defense.

Although Ye Tian's blow knocked away this group of Supreme Dao Void Demons, the residual attack did not break through Xu Guang's defense, but it also shattered the light on his body.

"Trap him!"

The Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon at the head commanded.

In a flash.

These Supreme Dao Void Demons disappeared, but Ye Tian was trapped by a large array.

"These Supreme Dao Void Demons actually carry formations with them!"

Ye Tian attacked this big array with all his strength, and he couldn't break it for a while.

"No wonder let these Supreme Dao Void Demons protect Xu Guang, such a guard configuration is enough to block a top Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm, and even be able to trap a top Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm for a moment. Ye Tian muttered.

At this time.

Xu Guang retreated far away, for fear that Ye Tian would rush out and kill him.

"Is there really a Supreme Dao Realm sneaking in and killing me?"

Xu Guanghou was afraid.

However, he wasn't too worried now, with the reaction of the Heavenly Blood Vein, at most a few breaths, a demon lord would descend.

But at this moment, a figure approached him.

"It's a Supreme Void Demon!"

He guessed that the other party might have heard the movement and came over to take a look, but he didn't pay much attention.

After all, the Heavenly Blood Vein knew about his existence and would not come to attack him.

But the next second.

This Supreme Dao Void Demon killed him, and the Supreme Dao rules that permeated his body were the fourth sequence of Supreme Dao rules.

"No!"

The Fourth Sequence of Supreme Dao Rules penetrated his body, and with a slight shock, it directly shattered his body and killed him instantly.

Dandi Xu Guang has fallen!

"Fortunately, I had a little more preparation, otherwise Xu Guang would have really survived!"

And the next breath.

A figure descended, and it was a demon lord of the Heavenly Blood Vein, surpassing the existence of the Ninefold Dao Realm.

Without the slightest hesitation, he directly annihilated the two replica bodies.

Copying the body to commit suicide, those eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demons and Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons were all stunned, and when they saw a demon lord coming, they all respectfully said: "Lord Flame Cracking Demon Lord!"

"Xu Guang was killed!!!!"

The Flame Crack Demon Lord was furious.

This group of wastes can't even protect a supreme realm.

"Forgive the Lord of the Flame Split, we didn't expect this to happen. "

They tried to explain, but the Flame Crack Demon Lord didn't give them a chance to explain.

Xu Guang was too important to the Supreme Dao Void Demon Clan, and as a result, he died here, and these Supreme Dao Void Demons must die.

Airplanes!

A wind blew, and these Supreme Void Demons turned into stone statues, and then they all crumbled and died.

Followed by.

The Flame Crack Demon Lord came to the Heavenly Blood Realm to question the Blood Demon Lord.

Heavenly Blood Realm.

The Flame Cracker Demon Lord is here.

"Blood Chen Demon Lord, your descendant Blood Huangzi killed Xu Guang?"

The Blood Chen Demon Lord was stunned, "Xuehuangzi killed Xu Guang, what are you kidding, he is only seven to the Dao realm, and Xu Guang has so many Supreme Dao Void Demon protection, how could he be killed by Xuehuangzi?"

Wow!

The Flame Crack Demon Lord waved his hand, and a picture projection was a scene of Blood Huangzi killing Xu Guang, which was intercepted by the Flame Crack Demon Lord.

"Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule???" The Blood Chen Demon Lord was surprised, "Could it be that the Blood Huangzi has successfully researched?"

"Blood Huangzi has committed suicide!" said the Flame Crack Demon Lord.

"What, he killed himself?"

The Blood Chen Demon Lord was stunned, and he didn't know what the situation was.

"I suspect that the Blood Huangzi is just a clone, or is controlled by the powerful Supreme Dao Realm, or some other special circumstances, I need to use the Heavenly Blood Deduction Tablet to deduce. "The Flame Crack Demon Lord Dao.

"Good!"

The Blood Demon Lord responded.

Xu Guang was killed, this matter had too much impact, and he also knew that Xu Guang's research was about to succeed, and even a low-level version was currently researched, which could make some Supreme Dao Void Demons slightly improve their bloodline.

Therefore, Xu Guang was killed, which made the loss of the Heavenly Blood Vein too great.
